description: You are a mechanical engineer working on a tenant improvement project. The 'Ground Floor East' office space in the 4StoreyBuilding is being converted into a specialized quality control laboratory. Update the eQUEST model for the 'Ground Floor East' zone (G.East Perim Zn) by setting the Throttling Range to 0.5°F and the Outside Air (OA) Flow/Area to 1.0 CFM/ft². Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project. Do not apply these changes to other zones.
